title: CVE-2026-45498: Microsoft Defender DoS
summary: [P1] Microsoft Defender contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for denial of service, and it is being actively exploited in the wild. This affects Microsoft Defender users, particularly those with internet-facing systems. Why now: Reported active exploitation in the wild. (confidence: 0.90)

title: CVE-2008-4250: Microsoft Windows Buffer Overflow
summary: [P1] Microsoft Windows contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the Windows Server Service that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code, and it is being actively exploited in the wild. This affects Microsoft Windows users, particularly those with internet-facing systems. Why now: Reported active exploitation in the wild. (confidence: 0.90)

title: CVE-2010-0806: Microsoft Internet Explorer Use-After-Free
summary: [P1] Microsoft Internet Explorer contains an use-after-free vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code, and it is being actively exploited in the wild. This affects Microsoft Internet Explorer users, particularly those with internet-facing systems. Why now: Reported active exploitation in the wild. (confidence: 0.90)
